biography:
Be the CEO of your own life!! 😎 From hotels to high rises - here to help you invest in Dubai while globe trotting in style!! 🌎 
* BRN: 69437

latestPosts.caption:
I just made my investors 3% within 1 month! 😍

#rawdistrict #DubaiRealEstate #Dubai #fullyfurnishedapartments #commercialoffices

Not just a place to live, RAW District is a whole vibe! 🎨✨ 

From recording podcasts at the studio to 3D printing in the design lab, to grabbing coffee and taking calls in the co-working lounge @imtiazdevelopments has built the ultimate creative playground. 

Dubai, you aren't ready for this! 🚀🎬

#rawdistrict #dubairealestate #creativeliving #imtiazdevelopments #dubaïlife

Everyone asks me, "What's the secret behind KIRPA?" 🤔

It's simple! ✨️

Incredible leaders like @manpreet.kirpa and @jai.kirpa - Unmatched discipline, relentless hard work, and a team that genuinely wants to see each other win.

No wonder KIRPA is the most followed real estate agency in Dubai! 🚀

Lucky to be part of a team that pushes each other to grow every single day. Here's to learning from the best! ❤️🙌

#kirpaproperties #kirpa #dubairealestate #womeninbusinessrock #dreamteam

They say "We'll think about it" and RAW District 1 sold out in a blink.  But GOOD NEWS: RAW DISTRICT 2 is now officially LIVE on Sheikh Zayed Road. ✨️

* RAW DISTRICT 2* 

USP's:
- Located bang on Sheikh Zayed Road
- 2 mins walking distance from existing metro station 🚇
- 10 mins from the world's largest airport, Al Maktoum Airport
- 10 mins from Expo City, home to the headquarters of Fortune 500 companies and the biggest exhibition center.

Prices start from just AED 660K

EOI's are about to close.

DM now for more details! 📩

#Rawdistrict #DubaiRealEstate # luxuryliving #investor #sheikhzayedroad

You can now own your dream appt without paying the 20% downpayment 🤯

DM "KIRPA" to know more!

You can now own a "BEACHFRONT" apartment in Dubai by paying just 1% every quarter! 🤩

DM "Beachfront" to get more details.
